## Collections.AggregatedResultMap.addCollectionWithItems() method

Adds a new collection with the specified ID and optional initial entries.

**Signature:**

```typescript
addCollectionWithItems(collectionId: string, items?: Iterable<KeyValueEntry<string, unknown>>, options?: IAddCollectionWithItemsOptions): Result<TCOLLECTIONID>;
```

[Result](./ts-utils.result.md)<!-- -->&lt;TCOLLECTIONID&gt;
